meaning: adj.症状的,征候的,征兆的,有症状的,表明...的症候
examples: These disagreements are symptomatic of the tensions within the party.
The city's problems are symptomatic of the crisis that is spreading throughout the country.
It is symptomatic of the swing between the outright rejection and qualified acceptance of the medium that was fairly typical of the artistic establishment.
Someone can be infected with Ebola for up to 21 days before becoming symptomatic.
And is the lack of them symptomatic of a wider corporate attitude to the commuter?
